title: Reforged Armor
description: Reforged Armor adds five specialized armor sets built from Netherite, each with powerful full-set bonuses.
body:
# **🔥 Reforged Armor**

Reforged Armor expands Minecraft’s late-game progression with five powerful, specialized armor sets, each designed for a specific environment or playstyle. Built around the 1.20 Netherite upgrade system, this mod introduces custom ingots and upgrade smithing templates that allow you to reforge Netherite armor into unique endgame gear.

⚒️ Armor Progression (1.20 Style)

Reforged Armor follows the Netherite upgrade system introduced in Minecraft 1.20:

1. Craft or obtain Netherite armor
2. Use a Reforged Upgrade Smithing Template
3. Add the corresponding Reforged Steel Ingot
4. Upgrade your armor at a Smithing Table

Each armor type includes:
- A custom steel ingot
- A matching upgrade smithing template
- A full set of armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)

This system keeps progression familiar while adding meaningful specialization beyond Netherite.

🛡️ Full Set Requirement

All armor effects in Reforged Armor are full-set bonuses.

➡️ You must wear all four pieces of the same armor type to gain its abilities.
Mixing armor sets or missing pieces will disable all special effects.

This ensures balance and encourages committing fully to a playstyle.

##  **🛡️ Armor Sets & Abilities**


### 🔥 Ember Steel Armor

Built for extreme heat and lava exploration.

Full Set Effects:

- Amber Vision – See clearly while submerged in lava
- Lava Walker – Walk safely across lava surfaces
- Fire Resistance – Complete immunity to fire and lava damage

### 🌑 Dark Steel Armor

Engineered for survival in the Deep Dark.

Full Set Effects:

- Silent Footsteps – Movement does not alert the Warden
- Darkness Immunity – Immune to the Darkness status effect
- Sonic Resistance – Reduced damage from sonic-based attacks

### ☁️ Aether Steel Armor

Focused on mobility and aerial control.

Full Set Effects:

- Fall Damage Immunity – No damage from falls
- Elytra Collision Negation – No damage when flying into walls
- Double Jump – Perform an additional jump mid-air
- Speed I – Permanent movement speed boost
- 
### 🕳️ Void Steel Armor

Powered by unstable End energy.

Full Set Effects:

- Short-Range Teleport – Instantly teleport up to 7 blocks
- Enderman Neutrality – Look at Endermen without provoking them
- Levitation Immunity – Immune to Shulker levitation

### ☠️ Wither Steel Armor

Infused with dark soul energy.

Full Set Effects:

- Wither Immunity – Completely immune to the Wither effect
- Undead Damage Reduction – Reduced damage from undead mobs
- Soul Stride – Increased movement speed on soul sand and soul soil

📦 Mod Information

Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

Mod Loader: Forge

Environment: Client & Server
